Name: Average time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants containing both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants where SW-Reviewer Agreed eventually occurs
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average cycle time of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation when followed by SW-Reviewer Agreed versus when followed by SW-Reviewer No Response
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time elapsed from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants that lead to SW-EIC Accept compared to those leading to SW-EIC Major Revision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average waiting time after First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation until the next reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Initial Reviewer Selection or SW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Total resolution time of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation measured until the occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed in manuscripts undergoing multiple revision rounds
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants that include a Resubmission Manuscript Submission Confirmation versus those that do not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and SW-Reviewer Agreed in high-performance variants (those with total performance under 100,000 seconds)
Metric: the minimum of the function base < 100000 where base is the duration between the first time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and the last time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time it takes for SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation in cases where the manuscript originated from a Major Revision workflow (indicated by RW–Major Revision due activities preceding First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'", 'aggregation': 'average', 'filter': "activity == 'RW–Major Revision due in 3 days'"}"
